scripts.dev: bun run build:workspace-deps && bun --conditions @mdcms/source scripts/build-review-runtime.ts && sh -lc 'trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; bun run build:workspace-deps:watch & bun --conditions @mdcms/source scripts/dev-runtime-watch.ts & NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 bun x next dev --hostname ${MDCMS_STUDIO_REVIEW_HOST:-127.0.0.1} & wait'
scripts.vercel-build: bun run build:workspace-deps && bun --conditions @mdcms/source scripts/build-review-runtime.ts && next build
